reasoning: The control AC-3(8) focuses on the enforcement of access revocation. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that role bindings and service account tokens are properly revoked when access is no longer authorized. This involves checking that role bindings are updated or removed when access needs change, and that service account tokens are invalidated when no longer needed. Additionally, ensuring that token revocation policies are configured can help enforce this control.
title: Access Enforcement - Access enforcement | revocation of access authorizations enforce the revocation
